sp_widget.name: MSP Create Ticket Modal
sp_widget.template:
${Open a Support Case}

${If you are submitting a Trouble Ticket}

${How can we help you?}

${What is the impact?}

${What is the urgency?}

${What is the problem related to?}

  • {{item.title}}
  • ${I'm not sure}
  • {{item.title}}
  • ${View All}

{{item.name}}

{{item.short_description}}

${msp_ticket_unavaliable_product} {{selectedItem.name}} ${was not found as part of your environment}.

${Please reclassify your request or use the "I'm not sure" option in the lower left corner of the previous page}.

${If you have any questions contact your sales representative via} {{data.sales_rep}} - {{data.sales_rep_contact}} ${or the Customer support (https://www.equinix.com/contact-us/customer-support/?5)}.

${Disaster already declared for this Account!}

{{field.label}} {{field.value}}
{{comp.name}}
${Resource Unique Identifier} {{comp.resource_id}}
${Public Cloud Provider} {{comp.csp}}
${Group} {{comp.group}}

${Would you like to receive an estimate of work hours to this request?}

${Once you submit this ticket, our analysts will estimate your request.}

${Your approval will be required.}

${You are removing components from the Managing Host service}
${This action cannot be undone to include it again you must open a new ticket}

${Your request will be treated by our analysts. You will receive an estimate for approval soon.} ${For the requested service, hours will be deducted from your support plan or you will be charged if the required execution time exceeds the hours available.} ${For Service requested, hours will be deducted from your MS Support Plan or you will be charged in a rate of R$ 250/hour if execution time required exceed available hours.} {{data.service_cost}}

${Note: Please note that it will be estimated to be about 1.5 times longer for non-business hours.}

${Your request will be treated by our analysts. The permissioned users will receive an estimate for approval soon}.

${Your support case was submitted successfully}.

${One of our agents will work on it.}

${Thanks for your interest on new Equinix products. Your CSM will contact you soon.}

${Close}
${Open a Support Case}
${Open a similar support case with pre-populated fields.}
